nodes.name: Fetch All Criteria
nodes.notes: Fetch all confirmed criteria for this tender. Used to build the full criterion map for each bidder.

nodes.name: Fetch All Evidence
nodes.notes: Fetches ALL evidence for this tender in one call. FastAPI returns a flat array filtered by tender_id. We join to criteria in the next Code node.

nodes.name: Build Evidence-Criterion Pairs
nodes.notes: Joins criteria and evidence into flat triplets. Sets evidence_missing:true when evidence is null or value is null. This is the single source of truth for the rule layer.

nodes.name: Rule Layer
nodes.notes: Single Code node handles ALL rule types: missing evidence, financial numeric, certification date expiry, compliance boolean. Sets needs_llm:true for technical/ambiguous cases. Handles Indian number formats (crores, lakhs, commas).

nodes.name: Needs LLM?
nodes.notes: Routes to LLM only when rules couldn't decide. FALSE path = rule gave a clear verdict, skip LLM entirely.

nodes.name: LLM Verdict Reasoning
nodes.notes: Called only for: technical criteria, ambiguous compliance values, borderline confidence. Temperature 0.0. Max tokens 400 — verdict object is small.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Verdict
nodes.notes: Enforces valid verdicts only. Applies confidence gate <0.75 → MANUAL_REVIEW. Detects hedging language in ELIGIBLE verdicts and downgrades. Never crashes — always returns a valid verdict.

nodes.name: Assemble Verdict Record
nodes.notes: Merges rule and LLM paths into one canonical VerdictRecord shape. Sets requires_officer_review flag. Leaves officer_override fields null for the human review step.

nodes.name: POST Verdict to FastAPI
nodes.notes: FastAPI writes to verdict_events (append-only). Also writes AuditEvent. UI dashboard updates when it polls GET /verdicts?tender_id=.

nodes.name: Back to Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Routes back into the Split In Batches loop for the next pair.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "tender_id": "{{ $('Loop Complete').item.json.tender_id }}",
  "event_type": "evidence_extraction_complete",
  "actor": "n8n_wf3",
  "entity_type": "tender",
  "entity_id": "{{ $('Loop Complete').item.json.tender_id }}",
  "detail": "Extraction completed for {{ $('Loop Complete').item.json.bidder_ids.length }} bidder(s): {{ $('Loop Complete').item.json.bidder_ids.join(', ') }} at {{ $('Loop Complete').item.json.completed_at }}"
}

nodes.name: Notify Evaluation Complete
nodes.notes: FastAPI updates tender status to verdicts_ready. UI polls this status — when it changes, the dashboard populates automatically.
